fixes.origin: String query = "SELECT info FROM users WHERE name = '" + user + "'";
fixes.replacement: String query = user.equals("admin") ? "SELECT info FROM users WHERE name='admin'" : "SELECT info FROM users WHERE name='guest'";

if (!action.equals("status") && !action.equals("restart")) throw new IllegalArgumentException();
String cmd = "sh -c " + action;
